hero.title: Where Moroccan Contemporary Art
hero.subtitle: Discover the intersection of tradition and modernity in the heart of Asilah

about.title: A Cultural Beacon on the Atlantic Coast
about.subtitle: Founded in the heart of Asilah's historic medina, AHAYZONE is dedicated to showcasing the finest Moroccan contemporary art and fostering cultural exchange between Africa, Europe, and beyond.
about.mission: Our mission is to create a platform where Moroccan artists can present their work to the world, where collectors can discover new voices, and where visitors can experience the transformative power of contemporary art.

asilah.title: The Asilah Murals Festival
asilah.subtitle: For over four decades, the small fishing town of Asilah has been transformed into one of the world's most extraordinary open-air art galleries.
asilah.history: Founded in 1978 by artist Mohamed Melehi and writer Mohamed Benaïssa, the Asilah Cultural Moussem brings international artists to paint the whitewashed walls of the medina. What began as a vision to revitalize the historic town has become a global cultural phenomenon.
timeline: First Moussem founded by Melehi & Benaïssa
Asilah recognized as UNESCO heritage site
Over 200 murals painted across the medina

footer.description: Contemporary art gallery in Asilah, Morocco. Showcasing the finest Moroccan contemporary art since 2020.

aboutPage.title: About AHAYZONE
aboutPage.subtitle: A contemporary art gallery at the crossroads of cultures
aboutPage.history: Founded in 2020, AHAYZONE emerged from a vision to create a world-class contemporary art space in the historic town of Asilah — a place where the Atlantic meets the Mediterranean, where Africa meets Europe, where tradition meets innovation.
aboutPage.vision: We envision Asilah as a global destination for contemporary art — a town where centuries-old medina walls serve as canvases for the most exciting artistic voices of our time.
aboutPage.mission: AHAYZONE is dedicated to discovering, supporting, and presenting Moroccan contemporary artists to local and international audiences. Through exhibitions, residencies, and cultural programming, we create meaningful encounters between art and its audience.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We present only the highest quality contemporary art, curated with rigorous standards.

values.title: Heritage
values.description: We honor Moroccan artistic traditions while pushing boundaries toward new forms of expression.

values.title: Dialogue
values.description: We foster exchange between cultures, generations, and artistic disciplines.

values.title: Community
values.description: We are committed to Asilah and its people, contributing to the town's cultural vitality.
